text:
Once upon a time, in a small village nestled between two mountains, there lived a young girl named Lila. Lila was known for her kind heart and her ability to understand the language of animals. One day, while wandering through the forest, she encountered a group of baby birds who had fallen from their nest.

Lila gently picked up the birds and carried them back to the safety of the tree where they belonged. The mother bird, a wise old sparrow, thanked Lila for her kindness and offered her a seed from the sacred tree at the top of the mountain as a token of gratitude.

Excited by the prospect of finding such a rare treasure, Lila set out early the next morning with her trusty basket. She climbed higher and higher until she reached the summit, where she found the tree surrounded by a magical glow. Plucking a single golden seed from the branch, she carefully placed it in her basket.
